name: SCP | Back In Black |
description:
"WHO PUT A PICTURE OF 096 ON 173?!" Lorebooks included

(The first SCP Lorebook.)

(The Second)

This bot was made with the primary goal of just making a better roleplay setting for the SCP world.

Creator note:

I can't add every SCP to the bot, so I kinda got the top like 40ish and made a summary of those I thought of. Then added recommendations by my comments.

!!!Update!!!
